task_completion.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the Custom Fields administration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent logged into Redmine as 'admin' and accessing the 'Custom fields' section under Administration.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Estimated Cost' custom field with the Float format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the custom field creation/edit form showing the Name as 'Estimated Cost' and the Format dropdown set to 'Float'.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Estimated Cost' as Required, Searchable, and assigned to Bug and Feature trackers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Estimated Cost' form showing the 'Required' and 'Searchable' checkboxes ticked, and only the 'Bug' and 'Feature' checkboxes selected under Trackers.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Building Wing' custom field with the List format and correct values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Building Wing' form showing Format as 'List' and the 'Possible values' text area containing exactly: North Wing, South Wing, East Wing, West Wing, Central Atrium (each on a new line). Multiple values should NOT be checked.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Building Wing' for Bug, Feature, and Support trackers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Building Wing' form showing only the 'Bug', 'Feature', and 'Support' checkboxes selected under Trackers.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Safety Inspection Required' custom field with the Boolean format and default value 'Yes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Safety Inspection Required' form showing Format as 'Boolean' and the 'Default value' set to 'Yes' (or '1').

task_completion.description: Configure 'Safety Inspection Required' for Bug and Support trackers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Safety Inspection Required' form showing only the 'Bug' and 'Support' checkboxes selected under Trackers.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Redmine web interface using a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the Redmine application, rather than terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the custom fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking the 'Save' button for each field, or a final screenshot showing all three new fields listed in the main 'Custom fields' index page with a 'Successful creation' flash message.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels are open to manipulate the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements for the three 'Issue' custom fields: 1. 'Estimated Cost': format=float, required=true, searchable=true, trackers=['Bug', 'Feature']. 2. 'Building Wing': format=list, values=['North Wing', 'South Wing', 'East Wing', 'West Wing', 'Central Atrium'], trackers=['Bug', 'Feature', 'Support']. 3. 'Safety Inspection Required': format=bool, default_value='1' (Yes), trackers=['Bug', 'Support'].
